_comment: HBO primitive type-code -> byte size, per format. Code numbering/sizing is format-specific (note code 9 differs: inline=8, registry=4). Add a new code here when a new Painter version introduces one (e.g. via 'automap.py --register-primitive CODE=SIZE'). The inline table is read by hbo_decode.py; the registry table is read by hbo_reserializer.py (its explicit per-code branches still take precedence where present).
